summary: A vehicle is traveling along a highway when another car suddenly appears on the right side of the road, seemingly veering into the lane.

events_timeline.event: A car suddenly emerges from the right side of the road, veering into the lane.

uncertainties: The sudden emergence of the car may indicate reckless driving.
The precise cause of the car's erratic movement remains unclear.

risk_assessment.why: The sudden appearance of a car on the roadway, veering into the lane, poses a significant risk of collision.
